privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook database, a real publicly-available dataset combining actual iTunes media library data with realistic fictional customer records and auto-generated sales data spanning 2009-2013. The database contains 412 total invoices (2,240 invoice line items). For the archival period: 2009 has 83 invoices (454 items, $449.46 revenue, 46 unique customers) and 2010 has 83 invoices (455 items, $481.45 revenue, 46 unique customers). The database uses standard SQLite with properly defined invoices and invoice_items tables including InvoiceDate, Total, and CustomerId fields. The working database will be created at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_working.db, archive at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_archive.db, and reconciliation CSV at /home/ga/Documents/exports/archival_reconciliation.csv.
